Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails using search_emails (query: "Marcus Webb" or "Canopy" or "cryogenic" or similar). Find Patricia Langford's Q2 relocation request listing Marcus Webb (Lab Research Associate, Detroit → Chicago) with cryogenic lab equipment. Discover the split-vendor arrangement (Heartland household + Swift cold-chain), Swift quote still pending, Chicago lab dock address outstanding, $1,200 cold-chain surcharge pending client approval.
OE 2: Search emails using search_emails (query: "NorthWind" or "Pam Kowalski" or "Denver" or similar). Find Pam Kowalski's original relocation request for Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz as part of NorthWind's Denver satellite office expansion, both Chicago → Denver.
OE 3: Search emails using search_emails (query: "Victor Huang" or "chain-of-custody" or "security requirements" or similar). Find Victor Huang's (CISO) security requirements email with 5 conditions for Raj Patel's server lab: encryption verification, supervised loading with IT escort, direct transport with no warehouse stops, signed chain-of-custody log, and GPS tracking. Also find Victor's subsequent breach report to Chloe Vance — movers arrived and began loading before the scheduled 9:00 AM IT escort, loaded without NorthWind authorization, equipment placed in overnight warehouse storage (explicitly prohibited).
OE 4: Search emails using search_emails (query: "Pam Kowalski" or "NorthWind" or "final warning" or similar). Find Pam Kowalski's April 24 formal final warning to David Chen NorthWind evaluating whether MoveOps can continue, mentions PathFinder Logistics competitor, demands retention proposal by Friday.
OE 5: Search emails using search_emails (query: "KeyMove" or "Craig Nguyen" or "Steinway" or "piano" or similar). Find Craig Nguyen's damage report to blessing.okafor@moveops.com Steinway Model B, surface scratch ~4.5–5 inches on bass side rim, damage during extraction at second-floor landing. Also find Marcus Thorne's email reviewing the KeyMove $1,200 insurance claim rider.
OE 6: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Marcus Webb" or "NorthWind" or "cryogenic" or "Steinway" or similar). Find Chloe Vance's coordinator assignments in #operations (C006) locking in Blessing Okafor for all three moves, Heartland cold-chain limitation discussion, NorthWind chain-of-custody ops assessment (including the specific detail that movers arrived at 7:00 AM before the 9:00 AM escort), and Julian Brooks' note about Emilia Cruz's unanswered Steinway complaint callback.
OE 7: Search CRM using crm_search_companies (name: "Canopy") or crm_search_deals (dealname: "Canopy" or similar). Find deal_canopy_webb_apr2026 Marcus Webb Relocation (Detroit → Chicago, Apr 10–12), amount $3,200, stage: inprogress, AM: Catalina Dubois, Coordinator: Blessing Okafor. Swift quote pending, lab dock address outstanding.
OE 8: Search CRM using crm_search_companies (name: "NorthWind") or crm_search_deals (dealname: "NorthWind" or similar). Find deal_northwind_denver_expansion 2 relocations Chicago → Denver: Raj Patel (server lab, hazmat, chain-of-custody) and Emilia Cruz (Steinway piano, lease overlap). AM: Catalina Dubois.
OE 9: Search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Name, value: "Marcus Webb"). Find recMarcusWebbDetroitChicago Canopy Health, In Progress, Detroit MI → Chicago IL, Apr 10–12, Coordinator: Blessing Okafor, split-vendor cryogenic arrangement at -20°C.
OE 10: Search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Name, value: "Raj Patel"). Find recRajPatelChicagoDenver NorthWind Technologies, In Progress, Chicago → Denver, Apr 21–23, Coordinator: Blessing Okafor, server lab with lithium UPS (Class 9 hazmat), CISO chain-of-custody and IT escort requirements.
OE 11: Search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: Relocations, field_name: Name, value: "Emilia Cruz"). Find recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver NorthWind Technologies, In Progress, Chicago → Denver, Apr 14–18, Coordinator: Blessing Okafor, Steinway Model B grand piano (7ft, 480 lbs), specialty movers required.
OE 12: Search Linear using linear_list_projects (query: "DOT" or "compliance" or similar) and linear_list_issues (query: "Raj Patel" or "DOT" or similar). Find project_dot_compliance_audit (state: started, lead: Chloe Vance) and issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind (state: done, P2, all four checklist items verified Raj's hazmat documentation confirmed complete).
OE 13: Search Linear using linear_list_issues (query: "NorthWind" or "retention" or similar). Find linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1 NorthWind retention response plan (P1, assignee: David Chen), references Victor Huang breach, Emilia Cruz callback failure, and Catalina's broken recovery promise.
OE 14: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_bills (criteria related to "KeyMove" or similar). Find BILL-KEYMOVE-2026-0417 $1,200 insurance claim rider for Emilia Cruz Steinway scratch, Vendor: KeyMove Specialty Transport (VEND-KEYMOVE-001), Due: 2026-04-24, Doc: KM-44192-ICR.
OE 15: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria related to "Canopy" or "NorthWind" or similar). Find INV-2026-0401 (Canopy, includes $1,200 cold-chain surcharge for Marcus Webb) and INV-2026-0412 (NorthWind, includes Raj Patel hazmat surcharge + Emilia Cruz piano moving).
OE 16: Look up Pam Kowalski's email using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Pam Kowalski") or via email sender fields from prior search results. Find pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com (CRM contact record: contact_pam_kowalski). Note: Pam Kowalski is not in the Contacts service — she is in CRM contacts.
OE 17: Look up Blessing Okafor's email using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Blessing Okafor") (or similar). Find blessing.okafor@moveops.com.
OE 18: Update Airtable relocation records using airtable_update_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_id: tblRelocations01). Update recMarcusWebbDetroitChicago with vendor confirmation status and outstanding items. Update recRajPatelChicagoDenver with chain-of-custody breach details and DOT docs verified complete. Update recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver with Steinway damage details and KeyMove $1,200 claim status.
OE 19: Create Linear ticket for Marcus Webb cold-chain coordination using linear_create_issue (team: team_operations). Track Swift quote outstanding, lab dock address needed from Patricia Langford, vendor confirmation unresolved.
OE 20: Create Linear ticket for Emilia Cruz Steinway damage claim follow-up using linear_create_issue (team: team_operations). Track KeyMove $1,200 bill processing, client notification needed, damage resolution plan.
OE 21: Send email to Pam Kowalski using send_email (sender: blessing.okafor@moveops.com, recipients: pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com). Status update covering both NorthWind Denver moves Raj Patel server lab status and Emilia Cruz piano damage acknowledgment with next steps.
OE 22: Post in #operations Slack channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C006). Full breakdown of all three relocations Marcus Webb split-vendor status, Raj Patel chain-of-custody situation and DOT docs, Emilia Cruz damage claim status, plus tickets created and records updated.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
